   111	  defp repair_dirty_candidate(context, diagnosis, cycle, max_cycles, dirty_fingerprints) do
   112	    fingerprint = diagnosis.fingerprint
   113	
   114	    if MapSet.member?(dirty_fingerprints, fingerprint) or MapSet.size(dirty_fingerprints) >= 1 do
   115	      escalate_unresolved_dirty(context, diagnosis)
   116	    else
   117	      with :ok <- run_dirty_repair(context, diagnosis),
   118	           {:ok, candidate} <- context.candidate_head.confirm(context.workspace, context.issue, context.worker_host) do
   119	        next_cycle = if cycle < max_cycles, do: cycle + 1, else: cycle
   120	        Logger.info("Dirty candidate repaired and remotely confirmed at exact HEAD=#{candidate.head_sha}; restarting reviews")
   121	        run_delivery_cycle(context, next_cycle, max_cycles, MapSet.put(dirty_fingerprints, fingerprint))
   122	      else
   123	        {:error, {:candidate_workspace_dirty, next_diagnosis}} ->
   124	          escalate_unresolved_dirty(context, next_diagnosis)
   125	
   126	        {:error, reason} ->
   127	          {:error, reason}
   128	      end
   129	    end
   130	  end
   131	
   132	  defp escalate_unresolved_dirty(context, diagnosis) do
   133	    with :ok <- run_dirty_escalation(context, diagnosis) do
   134	      {:error, {:candidate_dirty_repair_unresolved, diagnosis}}
   135	    end
   136	  end
